name: PROCORE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Procore Technologies is the leading global provider of construction management software, offering a cloud-based platform with integrated product solutions for Preconstruction, Project Execution, Resource Management, and Financial Management. The company generates substantially all of its revenue from subscriptions to its products, pricing based on the number and mix of products and the annual construction volume contracted to run on the platform.

exposures.sentence: We are the leading global provider of construction management software, and are helping transform one of the oldest, largest, and least digitized industries in the world.
We also offer agentic AI capabilities to automate workflows across the entire construction lifecycle.

Our Procore Pay solution handles all aspects of the payment process between general contractors and subcontractors via a single system that promotes visibility and transparency for tracking payment requirements and automates the exchange of lien waivers.

catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we began offering customers access to our products in bundled packages in addition to on an la carte basis.
In January 2026, we acquired Datagrid, a leader in agentic AI solutions for the construction industry.

catalysts.event: FedRAMP Moderate authorization for Procore for Government
catalysts.sentence: We achieved U.S. Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) Moderate authorization for our Procore for Government solution in January 2026.

catalysts.event: Board authorization of $300M stock repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, our Board authorized a new stock repurchase program to repurchase up to $300.0 million of our outstanding common stock.
in January 2025, we acquired Novorender AS (Novorender), a leader in advanced BIM rendering technology.
